title: EATP Reasoning Trace
description: Structured rationale for a trust decision. Attachable to Delegation Records and Audit Anchors.

decision.description: What was decided — a concise statement of the decision or action

rationale.description: Why this decision was made — human-readable justification

confidentiality.description: Disclosure classification. Standard levels: public, restricted, confidential, secret, top_secret. Included in signature computation to prevent downgrade attacks.

alternatives_considered.description: Other options that were evaluated and rejected, with brief reasons

confidence.description: Decision confidence score (0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = full confidence). MUST be in range [0.0, 1.0]; values outside this range MUST be rejected at construction time.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to a piece of supporting evidence
